---
title: "Ethics of Reuse"
format: html
---

Responsible adaptation means:

-   preserving cultural meaning;
-   respecting author intent;
-   maintaining evidence quality and proper citation;
-   Ensuring modifications are transparent.

For further reading please see:

\ @RN70201. Available at: https://pressbooks.pub/oenmodify/;\
\ @RN70202. Available at: https://pressbooks.pub/authoropen/.

[![](images/clipboard-2765196364.png){fig-align="center" width="50"}](/OERs%20for%20creators/Creator-Quiz.html)
